title: Dragon Renames
description: This Texturepack adds many custom renames
body:
This Receurse Pack adds some renames for 1.21.5 or above.
**Note: This pack does not require any Mods like Optifine, but is incompatiple with many of its kind.**
Some example for Renames are:
| Galaxy Slicer
| Dragon Slam
| Earth Hammer
| Frozen Blade

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_If you want a custom renames for your self or puplic pls check out my discord server_

</details>

**DISCLAIMER: PLS CREDIT ME IF YOU USE IT**
Note: More renames will be added
